allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "$bytes = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\(''d:\\workspace\\AgentsGate\\backend\\mvnw.cmd''\); Write-Host \(''First 3 bytes: '' + \($bytes[0..2] | ForEach-Object { ''{0:X2}'' -f $_} | Join-String -Separator '' ''\)\); Write-Host \(''Has UTF-8 BOM: '' + \($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\)\)")

Bash(docker exec agentsgate-postgres-1 psql -U agentsgate -d agentsgate -c "ALTER TABLE skills DROP CONSTRAINT skills_status_check; ALTER TABLE skills ADD CONSTRAINT skills_status_check CHECK \(status::text = ANY \(ARRAY[''DRAFT'', ''PENDING_AI_REVIEW'', ''PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW'', ''AI_REJECTED_REVIEW'', ''PUBLISHED'', ''REJECTED'']::text[]\)\);")

Bash(docker exec agentsgate-postgres psql -U agentsgate -d agentsgate -c "ALTER TABLE skills DROP CONSTRAINT skills_status_check; ALTER TABLE skills ADD CONSTRAINT skills_status_check CHECK \(status::text = ANY \(ARRAY[''DRAFT'', ''PENDING_AI_REVIEW'', ''PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW'', ''AI_REJECTED_REVIEW'', ''PUBLISHED'', ''REJECTED'']::text[]\)\);")
Bash(docker exec agentsgate-postgres psql -U agentsgate -d agentsgate -c "SELECT pg_get_constraintdef\(oid\) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = ''skills_status_check'';")
